title: What’s at Stake for Oil Markets as Trump Strikes Iran
description: President Donald Trump’s decision to strike Iran creates new risks for a significant chunk of the world’s oil supply.
content: President Donald Trump’s decision to strike Iran creates new risks for a significant chunk of the world’s oil supply.
